title: Luffy Challenges Kaido Again
description: On pages 5–8, this part focuses on Unknown person #5, Who’s-Who, Unknown person #6, Straw Hat Pirates, Unknown person #7, Unknown person #8 as The raid becomes a series of decisive matchups while Luffy challenges Kaido and the Straw Hats protect their allies.
scene: The Onigashima raid breaks into decisive one-on-one and group battles as Luffy, Yamato, Momonosuke, and the Straw Hats push against Kaido’s forces.

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #5
dialogue.text: Allowing a rogue escape to live...

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: Well, who's to say he'll even survive the night?

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #6
dialogue.text: You hold a grudge against Luffy?

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: My real issue is with the one who stole the GOMU GOMU FRU fruit,

dialogue.speaker: Straw Hat Pirates
dialogue.text: luffy wears the same straw hat,

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: And he's the one who gained the power of the fruit!!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: It's only natural for my resentment to spread to him!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #7
dialogue.text: Just below... On the third floor

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #7
dialogue.text: Hahaha, dodging was a wise move!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #7
dialogue.text: Even your amusement Haki wouldn't be enough!!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: If you had tried to block it, you'd have been eaten alive!!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: I didn't think a slimy fishman could move that fast on dry land,

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: I'm not sure what to say to that.

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: It's generally no longer acceptable to express such discriminatory views on Fishmen...

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: That reminds me, there's something else I want to ask about ...!!

summary: This part advances the Wano / Onigashima War storyline through 34 dialogue beats, focusing on the raid’s momentum, character resolve, and the shifting battle lines.
